items.name: Classic Chai

items.name: Masala Chai
items.desc: Extra spice, extra soul. Our masala blend in every sip.

items.name: Karak Chai
items.desc: Bold, thick, and unapologetically strong. Not for the faint of heart.

items.name: Filter Coffee
items.desc: South Indian-style drip coffee. Dark, deep, and comforting.

items.name: Rose Chai
items.desc: Fragrant rose petals steeped with our classic chai blend.

items.name: Iced Masala Chai
items.desc: All the fire, served ice cold. Shaken, not stirred.

items.name: Chai Lemonade
items.desc: Our chai meets fresh lemon. Weird? Yes. Magical? Absolutely.

items.name: Mango Lassi
items.desc: Sun-ripe Alphonso mangoes blended with creamy yoghurt.

items.desc: Thick-sliced sourdough, hand-churned butter, a pinch of sea salt.

items.name: Masala Toast
items.desc: Chutney, veggies, and spices baked into every slice.

items.name: Jam & Cream Toast
items.desc: House-made seasonal jam with whipped cream. Simple joy.

items.name: Garlic Herb Focaccia
items.desc: Olive oil, roasted garlic, and rosemary on a cloud of dough.

items.name: Banana Bread
items.desc: Dense, moist, slightly caramelised. Baked fresh every morning.

items.name: Chai Cookies
items.desc: Spiced chai infused into a buttery, crumbly cookie. Dangerous.

items.name: Cardamom Brownie
items.desc: Fudgy chocolate brownie with a cardamom surprise in the centre.

items.name: Sesame Ladoo
items.desc: Hand-rolled, lightly sweetened sesame balls. Grandma-approved.
